title: Sattam
subTitle: Raja and Ravi, two best friends, fall in love with the same girl, Radha. But, trouble ensues when Ravi expects a sacrifice from her, in order to save his best friend.

title: Aagaya Pookkal
subTitle: Upon discovering the shocking truth about his friend Manikyam's death, Siva resolves to seek revenge as justice for his friend.

title: Mary Albert
subTitle: Owing to a Christian priest, a thug undergoes an extreme transformation. However, things get difficult when his past comes back to haunt him.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Captain
subTitle: Kannayiram, a powerful gangster, kills Ramasamy, for not giving up his land to him. After hearing this news, Shiva, Ramasamy's brother, flees the military camp to avenge his brother's death.

title: Unakkaga Oru Roja
subTitle: Kannan, a poor man, is in relationship with his colleague Meera. However, he abandons her when he gets a marriage proposal from a rich woman.

title: Enna Petha Raasa
subTitle: Lakshmi and Raja fall in love and decide to get married. But on the day of the marriage, Raja is accused of murdering a woman.

title: Thirunelveli
subTitle: Thulasi, a highly respected man in the village, is known for his truthfulness in all circumstances. But the real testing time arrives when his good trait brings a lot of trouble to the family.

title: Vetri Kodi Kattu
subTitle: Sekhar and Muthuraman are tricked by a con man who promises them visas to fly to Dubai. In order to protect their families from any harm, they decide to swap addresses.

title: Nalla Thambi
subTitle: Raju, unwilling to marry a girl chosen by his father, escapes from home with his mother's help. Later, he rescues Chitra from her controlling relatives and they fall in love.

title: Nalla Thambi
subTitle: Raju, unwilling to marry a girl chosen by his father, escapes from home with his mother's help. Later, he rescues Chitra from her controlling relatives and they fall in love.

title: Kurumbukaran
subTitle: Muthurasa, a playboy, falls in love with Vijaya, the daughter of a postmaster. When Vijaya does not reciprocate his love, he misbehaves with her.

title: Nalla Pambu
subTitle: A CID inspector involves himself in an undercover operation to put an end to the atrocities of a smuggler, who kills people for his personal benefits.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Santhosam
subTitle: An unemployed Indran is rejected by the people in his locality. He decides to end his life, when he meets Bhavani, who changes the course of his life.

title: Kannukku Kannaga
subTitle: After learning about Devi's relationship with Arun, her brother, Dharma, agrees to their union. However, trouble ensues when an astrologer predicts Dharma will die if Devi gives birth to a male child.

title: Vedikkai En Vadikkai
subTitle: Kandasamy, who always interferes in others' problems, comes to his sister's house to set things straight and also for his personal benefits.

title: Ennamma Kannu
subTitle: Kaasi, a womaniser, tries to woo Gayatri, a young woman, but she thwarts his advances. However, when her fiance deserts her on the day of her wedding, Kaasi offers her refuge.

title: Kannupada Poguthaiya
subTitle: Vetrivel, a respected man, dearly loves his brother and sacrifices his love for him. Problems arise when his brother, Subramaniyam, starts suspecting him of having an affair with his wife Gowri.

title: Aanazhagan
subTitle: Raja disguises himself as a married woman to find a rental house for his friends. However, trouble brews when he falls for the landlady's daughter.

title: Aanazhagan
subTitle: Raja disguises himself as a married woman to find a rental house for his friends. However, trouble brews when he falls for the landlady's daughter.

title: Rathna
subTitle: Rathnavelu and Muthuvelu are twin brothers who get separated at birth when their parents are killed by an evil man. Rathnavelu grows up and decides to take revenge on the man who killed his parents.

title: Anbu Thollai
subTitle: Singamuthu wants him and his brothers to marry girls who are sisters. However, Chinnathayi, his cousin, wants to marry him and decides to jeopardise all the marriage proposals that come his way.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Valeba Raja
subTitle: When Karthik is confronted by a dilemma to choose between Sweety, a woman he loves, and Shaalu, a woman who is chosen by his parents, Dr Raja decides to help him.

title: Viralukketha Veekkam
subTitle: Three wives are disappointed with their husbands who borrow money from people to live luxuriously. After the women get employed to earn more, their spouses start plotting against them.

title: Athisaya Piravi
subTitle: Kaalaiyan falls in love with Sumathi, the daughter of a wealthy person, who kills him. Things change when Kaalaiyan is reincarnated as Balu.

title: Vathiyaar
subTitle: Annadurai, an ordinary school teacher, turns into a Good Samaritan and runs an orphanage after a tragic incident. However, his actions are closely watched by ACP Easwara Pandian and his team.

title: Karuppan
subTitle: A bold act during a traditional bull-taming event secures Karuppan's marriage, yet jealousy and betrayal slowly unravel the trust within the family.

title: Demonte Colony
subTitle: Four inebriated friends decide to do something adventurous and visit a haunted bungalow. However, when one of them steals a diamond necklace, their home becomes a hotbed for supernatural activity.
